summary: A Fox News live broadcast segment in which an anchor interviews an ICE official (split-screen, then full-frame) about sanctuary city policies, with the network's 'FOX NEWS ALERT' lower-third caption and B-roll of a NYC street. It is a cable-news interview with no music or added editing.
notable_text: LIVE; TRUMP ADMIN ZEROING IN ON SANCTUARY CITY POLICIES; FOX NEWS ALERT; NEW YORK CITY THURSDAY WNYW
